description: Fix GamesLobby field name mismatch (use camelCase matching API response) and fix kami/battle replay jump logic (use phase metadata instead of inspecting cleared state fields).
steps: Fix GameRecord interface in GamesLobby.tsx to use 'players' (array), 'createdAt', 'updatedAt' instead of 'players_json', 'created_at', 'updated_at'
Remove JSON.parse call on players and use game.players directly
Update date display to use game.updatedAt/game.createdAt
Fix replayNextKami/replayPrevKami to scan by phase === 'politics' and description containing 'kami' instead of state.kamiResolutionActive
Fix replayNextBattle/replayPrevBattle to scan by phase === 'war' instead of state.currentPhase === 'war' && state.activeBattles.length > 0
acceptance_criteria: npm run build completes without TypeScript errors
GamesLobby uses correct camelCase field names matching server API response
Replay kami jump uses snapshot phase metadata instead of kamiResolutionActive state field
Replay battle jump uses snapshot phase metadata instead of activeBattles state inspection
verification: Run npm run build and confirm it passes with no errors
